ORCHESTRA AI Engineering Platform
ORCHESTRA
All Sections
ORCHESTRA — AI ENGINEERING PLATFORM

One developer. A team of AI engineers.

Connect your GitHub. Turn any repository into an AI-managed project. Ship in days, not months.

orchestra-cli — github.com/orchestradev/core

$ orchestra deploy --agents 4 --task "Refactor authentication module and write end-to-end tests"

✔ GitHub repository synced (branch: main → feat/auth-refactor)

ℹ Agent @architect assigned: analyzing 42 dependencies...

ℹ Agent @codegen assigned: writing OAuth2 token provider...

ℹ Agent @tester assigned: generating Jest test suites...

✔ 3 pull requests created and ready for automated merge.

$

01 — THE PROBLEM

Development became the bottleneck.

Legacy Workflow

Endless PR Backlogs

Manual code reviews, broken CI/CD pipelines, context switching overhead, 60% repetitive boilerplate code.

Orchestra Era

Parallel AI Execution

Autonomous bug fixing, automated PR reviews, instant branch sync, 10x developer velocity.

0 of dev time lost to bugs, refactoring, and boilerplate
0 longer time-to-market than stakeholders expect
0 engineer cost increase in the last decade
02 — WHY NOW

The moment is here.

0

global software development market — growing every year

0

of developers now use AI coding tools daily

0

platforms offering true multi-agent dev orchestration on GitHub

LLMs reached production quality. AI coding went mainstream. The infrastructure layer is missing.

03 — SOLUTION

From repository to AI-managed project in minutes.

01 GitHub Sync

Connect GitHub

Link your account. Import existing repositories instantly with full context awareness and branch mapping.

02 Task Engine

Create Tasks

Define tasks in plain language. Our routing engine breaks down complex features into actionable steps.

03 Parallel Workers

Deploy Agents

Multiple AI engineers work in parallel — each assigned a specialized role on an isolated git branch.

04 Code & Refactor

Generate Code

Agents write production-ready code, resolve linter warnings, refactor legacy modules, and run unit tests.

05 Automated PRs

Review & Merge

Pull requests are automatically opened with comprehensive diff summaries. You review, approve, and merge in one click.

06 Continuous Delivery

Ship Faster

Your codebase evolves continuously with compounding engineering velocity — faster than any human team could scale.

Ten capabilities. One workspace.

06 — BUSINESS MODEL

Seat-based. Usage-based. Enterprise.

01

Developer Seats

Per-seat subscription for individual developers and small teams.

0
02

Team Plan

Shared workspace, team repos, priority agent queues.

$99 / mo
03

Usage-Based AI

Pay per agent-hour for compute-intensive workloads.

per agent-hour
04

Enterprise

Self-hosted deployment, SSO, audit logs, SLA.

custom

Land with individual developers. Expand into engineering teams. Convert to enterprise contracts.

07 — COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE

Code assistants. We build the team.

Feature / Criterion PlatformORCHESTRA AssistantsCopilot / Cursor TraditionalHuman Dev Team
Execution ModelHow work is performed
✔ Multi-Agent Parallelism (Isolated branches)
✖ Single-prompt IDE autocomplete
✔ Parallel but communication-heavy
Task AutonomyScope of autonomous work
✔ End-to-End PR Delivery (Plan, code, review)
✖ Snippets & file edits only
✔ Full cycle (weeks/months)
GitHub IntegrationRepo awareness
✔ 100% Native Sync (Branch mapping)
~ Local file/workspace context
✔ Manual git workflows
Time to ShipDelivery velocity
⚡ Minutes to Hours (10x velocity)
⏱ Days (human dependent)
⏱ Weeks to Months
Cost EfficiencyEconomics
💰 ~$2 / agent-hour (Pay as you use)
💲 $20/mo + human salary
💲 $80+ / hr ($150K+/yr)

Orchestra is the only platform that combines true multi-agent parallelism with full GitHub repository management — not just a code assistant.

08 — TECHNOLOGY

GitHub API. Multi-agent orchestration. Real-time sync.

  • GitHub API & Context ManagementFull repository awareness. Branch isolation per agent. Real-time sync.
  • Multi-Agent OrchestrationTask routing engine assigns work across parallel agents with defined roles.
  • LLM InfrastructureModel-agnostic layer. Best-in-class LLMs for code generation and review.
  • Security LayerOAuth, scoped permissions, no code stored outside your GitHub — ever.
09 — ROADMAP

From MVP to AI Engineering Platform.

  1. 2026 · Q3

    MVP

    GitHub integration, single-agent task execution, PR generation, first 500 users.

  2. 2026 · Q4

    Multi-Agent

    Parallel agents, role assignment, branch management, team workspaces.

  3. 2027

    Platform

    Enterprise tier, self-hosted option, multi-repo support, integrations ecosystem.

  4. 2028+

    AI Engineering Platform

    Full autonomous engineering lifecycle. Agents that plan, build, test, and deploy.

10 — VISION

The future of development is one human, leading a team of AI engineers.
